old: 他在家学习汉语。
new: 他给妈妈打电话了。

old: He studies Chinese at home.
new: He called his mom.

content: 名词、代词或名词性短语作主语
old: 电影很好看。
new: 电视很好看。

old: 她高兴地唱歌。
new: 她慢慢地走进教室。

old: She sings happily.
new: She walked slowly into the classroom.

old: 学了一年，我学会唱这首歌了。
new: 老师说的话，我听懂了。

old: After studying for a year, I learned to sing this song.
new: I understood what the teacher said.

content: 简单趋向补语的趋向意义用法：动词+上/下/进/出/过/回
old: 他跑出了房间，去找妈妈。
new: 他跑上楼去找妈妈。

content: 简单趋向补语的趋向意义用法：动词+上/下/进/出/过/回
old: He ran out of the room to find his mom.
new: He ran upstairs to find his mom.

content: 简单趋向补语的趋向意义用法：动词+上/下/进/出/过/回
old: 他跑出了教室，没有回来。
new: 她走过去，把书给了他。

content: 简单趋向补语的趋向意义用法：动词+上/下/进/出/过/回
old: He ran out of the classroom and didn't come back.
new: She walked over and gave him the book.

old: 你看一看这件衣服，喜欢吗？
new: 你们休息休息吧，走了这么长时间了。

old: Have a look at this piece of clothing — do you like it?
new: Rest for a bit — you've been walking for so long.

old: 他喜欢跑步，每天早上跑半个小时步。
new: 她昨天跳了一个晚上舞，很累。

old: He likes running and runs for half an hour every morning.
new: She danced the whole evening yesterday and is very tired.

old: 你这样做是对的。
new: 今天这么热，我不想出去。

old: Doing it this way is correct.
new: It's so hot today — I don't want to go out.

content: 还2、已经、有时（候）、快、快要、正
old: 我正在吃饭，饭已经好了，你来吧。
new: 饭已经好了，你快来吧。

content: 还2、已经、有时（候）、快、快要、正
old: I'm eating; the food is already ready — come on over.
new: The food is already ready — hurry and come over.

old: 这个电影很好，也非常好看，你看看吧。
new: 这个苹果很好，也非常好吃，你吃吃吧。

old: This movie is very good and also really great to watch — watch it.
new: This apple is very good and also really delicious — have a taste.

old: 你会说中文，他也会，还会说英语。
new: 你会说中文，他也会，还会写汉字。

old: You can speak Chinese; he can too, and he can also speak English.
new: You can speak Chinese; he can too, and he can also write Chinese characters.

old: 不但我学中文，我弟弟也学中文。
new: 不但我学中文，而且我弟弟也学中文。

old: Not only do I study Chinese, my younger brother does too.
new: Not only do I study Chinese, but my younger brother does too.

content: 只有、只要、不但、而且、如果、可1、可是、然后
old: 如果你有时间，我们吃完饭然后一起去公园吧。
new: 你只有多练习，才能说好汉语。

content: 只有、只要、不但、而且、如果、可1、可是、然后
old: If you have time, let's go to the park together after dinner.
new: Only by practicing more can you speak Chinese well.

old: 他跑得太快了，我跟不上。
new: 这道菜好吃极了，我又吃了一碗。

old: He runs too fast — I can't keep up.
new: This dish is extremely delicious — I had another bowl.

old: 他工作很努力，这让大家都很高兴。
new: 他每天努力工作让大家很高兴。

old: He works very hard — this makes everyone very happy.
new: His working hard every day makes everyone very happy.

old: 他把书放上了桌子。
new: 他的钱包被人拿走了。

old: He put the book on the table.
new: His wallet was taken away by someone.

content: 趋向补语的引申用法：表示动作行为的开始：动词+上/起来
old: When they heard he was back, everyone started to cheer up.
new: When they heard he was back, everyone started to get happy.

old: 你需要多休息，明天还得上班呢。
new: 他愿意帮忙，你不必担心。

old: You need to rest more — you still have to go to work tomorrow.
new: He is willing to help — you don't need to worry.

content: 动宾式离合词：放假、见面、结婚、洗澡
old: 他们打算明年结婚，已经开始准备了。
new: 他们上个月见了一次面，觉得很开心。

content: 动宾式离合词：放假、见面、结婚、洗澡
old: They plan to get married next year and have already started preparing.
new: They met up once last month and had a great time.

content: 动补式离合词：打开、看见、离开、完成、分开
old: 他们完成了作业，高兴地分开了。
new: 作业太多了，我今天完不成。

content: 动补式离合词：打开、看见、离开、完成、分开
old: They finished the homework and happily went their separate ways.
new: There's too much homework — I can't finish it today.

old: 假如你有时间，可以来参加我们的活动。
new: 他每天坚持练习，可见他非常热爱这项运动。

old: If you have time, you are welcome to join our event.
new: He practises every day — it is clear he is very passionate about this activity.

old: 你同他一起去吧，路上有个伴。
new: 老师同家长都参加了这次家长会。

old: Go together with him — you'll have company on the way.
new: Both the teachers and the parents attended the parent-teacher meeting.

content: 借用名量词：脸、手、盒、屋子、桌子
old: 他跑步回来，脸上一脸汗，手上也是一手水。
new: 他跑步回来，一脸汗，手上也是一手汗。

content: 借用名量词：脸、手、盒、屋子、桌子
old: When he came back, his face was dripping with sweat and his hands were covered in water.
new: When he came back, his face was dripping with sweat and his hands were covered in sweat too.

old: 他总找借口，这就是说他不想负责任。
new: 他总是说没时间，这就是说他不想参加。

old: He always makes excuses — in other words, he doesn't want to take responsibility.
new: He always says he has no time — in other words, he doesn't want to participate.

old: 我经常去健身房，甚至还请了健身教练。
new: 我经常去健身房，甚至还请了教练。

old: I go to the gym regularly — I even hired a personal trainer.
new: I go to the gym regularly — I even hired a trainer.

old: 她不仅会说汉语，还会说法语和西班牙语。
new: 她不仅会说汉语，还会说别的外语。

old: She can not only speak Chinese but also French and Spanish.
new: She can not only speak Chinese but also other foreign languages.

old: 她连简单的问候都说不好，更难说整段对话了。
new: 她连简单的打招呼都说不好，更难说整个对话了。

old: She can't even manage a simple greeting well, let alone a whole conversation.
new: She can't even manage a simple greeting well, let alone an entire conversation.

old: 周末他不是在游泳馆游泳，就是在篮球场打篮球。
new: 周末他不是去游泳，就是在球场打篮球。

old: On weekends he is either swimming at the pool or playing basketball on the court.
new: On weekends he is either swimming or playing basketball on the court.

content: 前后动作先后发生，后一动作是前一动作的目的
old: 他去商店买东西。
new: 她去医院看病。

content: 前后动作先后发生，后一动作是前一动作的目的
old: He went to the shop to buy things.
new: She went to the hospital to see the doctor.

old: 我吃了早饭，去学校了。
new: 我吃了一个苹果。

old: I ate breakfast and went to school.
new: I ate an apple.

old: 我从来没坐过地铁。
new: 我没有坐过飞机。

old: I have never taken the subway.
new: I have never been on a plane.
